title: shen #8127
definition:
1) tooth, ivory
    1a) tooth
        1a1) of man, lex talionis, beast
    1b) tooth, tine (of fork)
    1c) ivory
        1c1) as material
        1c2) of commerce
    1d) sharp pointed rock
